description: Retrieves the current risking status for a given application reference. Returns a simple JSON object with a 'status' field, or 404 Not Found if the application reference does not exist.

pathParameters.name: applicationReference
pathParameters.description: The unique application reference identifier. Bound as an ApplicationReference value class.

responses.description: Found — returns a JSON object with the current status.

body.status: ApplicationForRiskingStatus enum string (ReadyForSubmission | SubmittedForRisking | Approved | FailedNonFixable | FailedFixable | ReadyForResubmission)

responses.description: Not Found — application reference does not exist in the database.

authentication.notes: Rejects if HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment is already active on the user.

interactions.action: Invoke AuthorisedAction — verify Government Gateway auth, AffinityGroup.Agent, credential role, absence of HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment
Query MongoDB for ApplicationForRisking by applicationReference
Return 200 OK with {status: application.status.toString} if found, or 404 Not Found

externalDependencies.name: HMRC Auth Service
externalDependencies.purpose: Validate Government Gateway credentials and retrieve enrolments/credentialRole/internalId

specialCases: Unlike ARR02, this endpoint returns 404 Not Found (not 204) when the application reference does not exist.
The response only contains the status string, not any individual or failure details.
Status is serialised as the enum case name string (e.g. 'ReadyForSubmission').
